description: Style NoteThe brightest tone of the sunflower, just before it wilts - this pair of sandals gets the season look right with the floral detail and pared down styling of the upper. This pair from enroute are apt for the beach and will look great with your cropped pants as well!Product DetailsCream sandal with leather straps, a toe separator and a strap looping around the ankle with a buckle closureLeather footbed with brandingDurable rubber outsole textured on the forefoot and heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
